title: Rotate PDF Pages — Fix Orientation Offline
h1: Rotate PDF Pages to the Correct Orientation
description: Fix upside-down or sideways PDF pages instantly in your browser. Fast and completely secure.

sections.title: Why Rotate PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Scanned documents often come out sideways. Fix their orientation instantly without uploading anything to the cloud.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Load the PDF with incorrect page orientation.

steps.title: Select Pages & Direction
steps.description: Choose pages to rotate and direction (90°, 180°, 270°).

steps.title: Download Fixed PDF
steps.description: Save the correctly oriented PDF immediately.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Scanned Documents Stay Private
sections.content: Scanned medical or legal documents rotated locally without any server access.

sections.title: Rotate Any PDF in Milliseconds
sections.content: Rotating 500 pages takes less than a second. No upload, no wait.

faqs.a: Yes, select specific pages or all at once.
No, rotation is lossless — no re-encoding occurs.
Yes, apply the reverse rotation before downloading.
